name: WesternGeco LLC v. ION Geophysical Corp.
question: Did the US Court of Appeals for the Federal Circuit err in holding that lost profits arising from prohibited combinations occurring outside of the US are categorically unavailable in cases in which patent infringement is proven under 35 U.S.C. § 271(f)?
description: A case in which the Court held that WesternGeco’s award for lost profits was a permissible domestic application of § 284 of the Patent Act.
